unresolved: SysExtensionAppClassFactory::getClassFromSysAttribute — FALSE POSITIVE arity-mismatch: validator demanded 3 args, real signature has _defaultInstantiation = null (default parameter). Ignored; xppc built clean.

root_cause_hypothesis: Two independent defects, neither of which affected the produced artifacts. (1) VALIDATOR_GAP: validate_code(mode="references") arity check counts declared parameters without honouring X++ default-valued (optional) trailing parameters, so a legal 2-arg call to SysExtensionAppClassFactory::getClassFromSysAttribute(ClassName, SysAttribute, SysExtAppClassDefaultInstantiation = null) is reported as a blocking error. get_method reports the default correctly, so the signature data is present; the arity comparison discards it. Any SysExtension/SysOperation call that relies on optional args hits this. (2) TOOL_DEFECT (harness gap): labels(action="create") writes the .label.txt + AxLabelFile descriptor but nothing ever compiles them — build_d365fo_project runs xppc only, never LabelC.exe — so freshly created labels stay unknown to the compiler and xppbp emits BPErrorUnknownLabel for every X++ label reference (and the label renders blank at runtime). Running LabelC.exe manually against the model cleared all 2 warnings, proving the labels themselves were correct.
suggested_fix_area: src/tools/validation (reference resolver arity check: treat parameters with a default value as optional, compare against [required, total]); build pipeline (build_d365fo_project should invoke LabelC.exe for models whose AxLabelFile content changed, or labels(action=create) should trigger/prompt label compilation).
